element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Basic combat mechanics taught via Spider-Man's standard moveset
Player learns alternative character with different move variety; co-op mechanics
Basic combat training; repetitive encounters establish core loop
Thematic escalation; heavily armed foes requiring learned evasion
Boss-tier encounters; narrative climax following five symbiote seed plot
Ultimate combat test; culmination of all learned mechanics

element_introduction_order.element: Cameo ally assists (Captain America, Ghost Rider, Hawkeye, Daredevil)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Narrative flavor; temporary mechanical benefits that provide relief moments

typical_relief_triggers: Story progression beats (following Lethal Protector comic sequence)
typical_tension_triggers: Constant flow of unavoidable enemy hits
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Relentless arcade-style beat-em-up pacing with minimal breathing room; repetitive enemy encounters create monotonous tension rather than dynamic rhythm cycles. Combat difficulty relies on cheap hits and enemy density rather than timed tension/relief patterns.

difficulty_curve.early_game: Gentle introduction via common thugs; teaches basic Spider-Man and Venom movesets with low enemy density
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalation through The Jury encounters (heavily armed antagonists) and increasing thug variety; symbiote seed removal narrative milestone introduces narrative tension
difficulty_curve.late_game: Five symbiote encounters and Carnage finale; boss-tier difficulty spike with cumulative move variety required

notable_level_patterns.description: Levels follow horizontal progression through themed locations (San Francisco street areas, underground city, Life Foundation headquarters). Loosely structured around comic book plot points from Venom: Lethal Protector.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: San Francisco digger confrontation stage (Lethal Protector #1 adaptation)

notable_level_patterns.description: Stages emphasize successive waves of thematically grouped enemies rather than exploration. Thugs > armed Jury > symbiotes progression mirrors narrative escalation.
Dedicated encounter spaces for The Jury, five symbiotes, and Carnage. Separate presentation from regular progression stages.
